metadata.title: Ubuntu LTS Security Hardening Baseline Component Definition
metadata.remarks: Component definition for the ubuntu-sec-audit automated assessment tool and Ubuntu LTS baseline

components.title: ubuntu-sec-audit
components.description: Automated security audit and hardening assessment tool for Ubuntu LTS (20.04+). Performs CIS/NIST-aligned checks with zero standard-mode dependencies.
components.purpose: Assess the security posture of Ubuntu LTS systems against CIS Benchmarks and NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls

control-implementations.description: NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 control implementations via automated checks

implemented-requirements.description: check_updates and check_reboot verify OS packages are current and pending reboots are flagged. check_debsecan scans installed packages against the Debian Security Tracker CVE database.
check_firewall validates UFW/nftables/iptables rules for IPv4 and IPv6 boundary protection. check_open_ports inventories all listening services.
check_ssh validates 15+ SSH daemon settings including PermitRootLogin, PasswordAuthentication, crypto algorithms, and connection limits.
check_auditd validates auditd installation and key audit rules. check_journald and check_rsyslog verify logging infrastructure.
check_aide validates AIDE file integrity monitoring. check_kernel_lockdown checks kernel integrity enforcement. check_secure_boot validates UEFI Secure Boot.
check_pam_lockout verifies account lockout configuration via pam_faillock/pam_tally2. check_fail2ban validates automated brute-force protection.
check_pam_pwquality validates password complexity requirements. check_ssh verifies key-based authentication settings.
check_unnecessary_packages removes unneeded services. check_open_ports flags unexpected listeners. check_kernel module blacklist reduces attack surface.
check_ntp validates time synchronization via systemd-timesyncd, chrony, or ntpd.
check_kernel validates process isolation sysctls. check_apparmor verifies MAC enforcement. check_systemd_service_hardening validates service sandbox directives.

control-implementations.description: CIS Ubuntu Linux 24.04 LTS Benchmark v1.0.0 control implementations

implemented-requirements.description: check_aide verifies AIDE is installed and database initialised
check_auditd verifies auditd is installed, enabled, and running with audit rules
check_ssh validates all CIS SSH server hardening requirements
check_kernel validates all network and kernel sysctl hardening parameters

components.title: Ubuntu LTS
components.description: Ubuntu Long Term Support Linux distribution (20.04, 22.04, 24.04). Assessed by ubuntu-sec-audit.
components.purpose: General-purpose Linux OS hardened to CIS/NIST baseline

status.remarks: Status reflects assessment posture prior to hardening. Update after remediation.
